materialize.summary: Materialized 93092/98102 submissions; retired submissions skipped 243; pages 7342; SQLite FTS quick_check ok.

operational_notes: The filesystem reached 100% usage during this burst. Only stale .git/objects/pack/tmp_pack_* scratch files and generated data/canonical.db were removed; data/canonical.db was then rebuilt deterministically by materialize.
The normalizers test file had been partially truncated when the filesystem was full; it was repaired and the focused ontology suite now passes.

notes: Continue the same loop: choose one measured bucket, exact-count it, implement one literal-gated deterministic rule or prune, materialize if generated outputs change, validate, and recount.
Avoid the route_m101 split reduction without owner policy confirmation; the scout noted it was previously intentionally retained as split because of route-specific SBS proposal evidence.
